name: Batgirl (Shazam)
description:
Cassandra "Cass" Cain is the vigilante Batgirl. Also known as Orphan, she fights crime as a member of the Batman Family. The daughter of assassins David Cain and Lady Shiva, she was raised to be the perfect killer before rebelling and joining Batman's crusade.

Age: 21

Hair: Black

Eyes: Brown

Other Recommended Characters: Barbara Gordon, Stephanie Brown, Kate Kane, Mary Marvel
creator: Dark.Redbird
